title: ilex × beanii
intro: Ilex × beanii is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Ilex glabra and Ilex rugosa, two species of holly. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Ilex × beanii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
